claim.statement: A checker that requires a real sandbox cannot certify when that sandbox profile is unavailable.
claim.negation_of: certification by a plugin that requested a sandbox the runner could not provide
claim.scope: one external plugin with requires_sandbox true

provenance.pipeline: runner refuses because a required real sandbox is unavailable in the portable profile

one_directional: A required-but-unavailable sandbox degrades to unverifiable, never certified.
